## Review Gate Checklist

- [ ] I reviewed against `docs/bible.md` conventions.
- [ ] I reviewed `docs/decisions.md` for relevant prior decisions.
- [ ] Reviewer used two-pass review:
  - [ ] Pass A: Correctness + product intent
  - [ ] Pass B: Engineering quality
- [ ] Reviewer output included all required sections:
  1. Summary + risk
  2. Must-fix
  3. Should-fix
  4. Questions/assumptions
  5. Missing tests
  6. Docs updates required (`bible.md` / `decisions.md`)
- [ ] All Must-fix items are closed, or waivers are documented with rationale.
- [ ] Docs are updated in-branch for behavior/architecture/API/schema/process changes.
